analysis_plan_ref.anchor: sections 7.3 (slot scoring), 7.5 (primary gate), 7.6 (instrument + informativeness gates), 7.7 (decision table), 7.8 (required reporting); machinery in analysis/ontg2.py (pinned above)

arms_mandatory_baselines: A0 frozen-baseline — the existing Pi hard-typing readout at its frozen primary score 33/84 (poc/g2/labels-proxy.jsonl, judge-pA labels); NO new generation or adjudication (plan section 7.2); consumed as a pinned constant, not a re-run arm

A1 bfo-only — BFO categorial anchors rendered soft; breadth/vacuity control; CANNOT authorize adoption (plan section 7.2); expected heavily vacuity-zeroed (17/84 slots anchor at top-entity by design and score 0 without source-specific refinement)
A2 bfo-sumo — A1 plus SUMO selectional-preference clauses ('Normally ...'); tests the already-loaded upper/mid-level typed source

A3 bfo-sumo-framenet — A2 plus FrameNet valency clauses ('Typically ...'); the INTENDED ADOPTION ARM; renderings are monotone A1 <= A2 <= A3 (clauses appended only where pinned source evidence exists)

dependent_vars.definition: per-slot score: 1 iff the blind judge answers yes AND the slot is non-vacuous in that arm (vacuous_by_arm from data/onto-softtype/soft-type-candidates.jsonl); missing/cannot-say/no-label/invalid/vacuous = 0 (plan section 7.3)
dependent_vars.name: slot_sound

dependent_vars.definition: sum(slot_sound)/84 per arm on the primary (judge-pA) construction — the endpoint quantity; fixed denominator 84 (abstention can never inflate precision)
dependent_vars.name: soundness_precision

dependent_vars.definition: (arm_yes - 33)/84 with Wilson 95% intervals and exact McNemar on the paired 84 ids (judge-pA labels) — REPORTED, never verdict-bearing
dependent_vars.name: delta_vs_baseline

dependent_vars.definition: slots whose BFO anchor is strictly below entity OR carrying a source-specific SUMO/FrameNet preference in that arm; A3 must reach >= 67/84 overall and >= 34/42 on R3 (plan section 7.6)
dependent_vars.name: non_vacuous_coverage

dependent_vars.definition: kappa per arm (pair stability only), decisive fraction per judge per arm, deranged-probe false-satisfaction per judge per arm
dependent_vars.name: instrument_vector

assumptions.claim: A0 baseline: the frozen g2 PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY readout scored the Pi hard-typing dump at 33/84 = 0.392857 on the primary judge-pA construction (poc/g2/result.json sha 96a23be5...; labels sha 93a12447...); kappa 0.643; probe false-sat 0.0 both judges; the frozen g2 record's own n>=500 instrument gate is unattainable on this corpus and that readout is estimation-only — inherited and disclosed here

build-time generation report (poc/ontology-import-g2/materials/generation-report.json): 84/84 slots rendered in every arm; non-vacuous 67/84 (A1), 83/84 (A2), 83/84 (A3); R3 non-vacuous 42/42 at A3; zero hard operational axioms emitted; 5 recorded conflicts (4 alignment-divergence on time-slot Event-frame citations, 1 underdetermined: kind, per plan section 5.3 no BFO Kind equivalent)

coverage disclosure (mandatory on every readout): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, measured by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; every soundness claim is bounded to these 84 self-authored kernel-v0-derived slots

the imported layer is SOFT-ONLY: every kot-soft-type/1 record carries binding:false, regime:policy, authority:preference, effect:rank-only and the five forbidden_effects; every kot-ont-bridge/1 record is identity_bearing:false authority:candidate; nothing here is endorsed, enters closure, or touches any concept hash (plan sections 3.1-3.4); the build validator fails closed on violation

source closure: only the pinned BFO bfo.jsonl, SUMO terms/axioms.jsonl, FrameNet frames/frame-relations.jsonl and the three frozen alignment-kernel-v0.json files feed generation; no WordNet, no gUFO, no network fetch, no model-generated external fact (plan section 2)

vacuity operationalisation: a slot is non-vacuous in an arm iff its BFO anchor is strictly below entity OR a source-specific SUMO/FrameNet preference is present in that arm; vacuous slots score 0 regardless of judge label — the machine reading of plan section 7.3 'top-level Entity with no more informative supported type = 0'

the bridge table was authored from the g2 failure MODE (hard universal sorts over-constrain), the explication structures, and the pinned source evidence — NOT tuned to per-item baseline labels; the per-item A0 labels enter only the paired McNemar at analysis time; judges see fresh order seeds, no arm identity, no sources, no vacuity flags
assumptions.note: pre-freeze skeptic attack should verify this by inspecting build-softtype.py BRIDGE against labels-proxy.jsonl

assumptions.claim: fresh-runs: no logged proxy row of any frozen record is consumed as an A1/A2/A3 output; A0 is a pinned CONSTANT of the frozen g2 readout per the maintainer-ratified plan section 7.2 ('no new calls'), not a reused run-row; the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend with this entry as the recorded decision

cost band: <= 628 stateless proxy calls, CPU-only build, target cash $1-5, hard stop $10 (budget.usd_cap); wall-clock expectation ~2-6 h given the measured g2lp per-call latency; the run ledger replaces these estimates

n_planned.call_arithmetic: 3 new arms x (84 real + 20 probes) x 2 judges = 624, plus 2 calibration items x 2 judges = 628 (plan section 8); A0 adds zero calls
n_planned.dropped_arms: A0 re-adjudication (plan section 7.2: frozen score, no new calls); human gold panel (Phase 6, post-proxy, maintainer-gated); gUFO arm (not loaded; plan section 9 Phase 8); WordNet enrichment (not loaded); any hard-law arm (forbidden by design)
n_planned.order_seeds: fresh deterministic per-judge-per-arm-per-phase order seeds 'ontg2/1|judge-<pk>|<arm>|<phase>|2026-07-12' with the run-g2lp sort-by-sha rule, pinned in poc/ontology-import-g2/materials/manifest.json
n_planned.statistics: primary: exact integer gate sound_A3 >= 34/84 on the judge-pA construction (plan section 7.5 — a point-estimate adoption gate, NOT a statistical-superiority claim). Co-reported, never verdict-bearing: two-sided Wilson 95% intervals per arm; exact two-sided McNemar on the paired 84 ids for A3-A0 and A2-A0 (p = min(1, 2*P(X<=min(b,c))), X~Bin(b+c,0.5)); R1/R3/R4 slices; pair-union and pair-concordant brackets; judge-pB sensitivity scores; BFO depth distribution and source-contribution counts from the generation report. kappa is proxy pair stability, never human-agreement evidence.
n_planned.verdict_name_mapping: pinned: PASS == GO-BFO-SUMO-FRAMENET (when /analysis/go_combined) or GO-BFO-SUMO + NO-GO-FRAMENET-pending-redesign (when /analysis/go_bfo_sumo_only); FAIL == NO-GO-VACUOUS (when /gates/informative_valid false) or NO-GO-ONTOLOGY-IMPORT (neither A2 nor A3 reaches 34/84); INSTRUMENT-INVALID == no conclusion, repair and mint a new frozen run; A1 passing alone changes NOTHING (breadth control; reported only). Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim.

endpoints.test: PRIMARY (plan section 7.5 verbatim rule): sound_A3 >= 34/84 on the judge-pA construction with vacuity-zeroed scoring — strict integer improvement over the frozen A0 baseline 33/84 = 0.392857. A point-estimate adoption gate, NOT a statistical-superiority claim; Wilson intervals and exact McNemar are co-reported and never replace the threshold. [rider verbatim]

A2 (BFO+SUMO) against the same 34/84 gate: if A3 fails or materially regresses while A2 passes, the decision is GO-BFO-SUMO + NO-GO-FRAMENET pending redesign (plan section 7.7 row 2); read only through the pinned verdict-name mapping

instrument gate (never FAIL/PASS/NULL): kappa >= 0.40 per new arm (pair stability only), each judge decisive on >= 90% of the 84 real items per arm (0.90 is the highest RT-4-decidable decisiveness bar at n=84: the Wilson 95% lower bound at the expected ~0.98 decisive rate is 0.936, so a 0.95 bar would be undecidable at the planned n — same power wall that made g2 INSTRUMENT-INVALID), deranged-sort soft-hedged probe false-satisfaction <= 0.30 per judge per arm, all pins match, zero blinding hits (any blinding hit aborts the run before assembly); failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

informativeness guard (plan section 7.6): >= 67/84 A3 outputs non-vacuous AND >= 34/42 R3 slots non-vacuous AND zero hard operational domain/range/disjointness/existential-generation rules emitted (generation-report + soft-record validator); failure => verdict FAIL read as NO-GO-VACUOUS even if the nominal soundness score exceeds 0.39

paired A3-A0 and A2-A0 item tables, exact two-sided McNemar p, Wilson 95% intervals per arm, delta_a2/delta_a3 — REPORTED ONLY (plan section 7.5: intervals and paired tests do not replace the integer threshold)

R1/R3/R4 slices per arm, pair-union and pair-concordant brackets, judge-pB sensitivity scores, BFO depth distribution and source-contribution counts (from the pinned generation report) — the plan section 7.8 mandatory reporting vector; descriptive, never verdict-bearing

A1 breadth control reading — REPORTED ONLY; a passing A1 authorizes nothing (plan section 7.2/7.7); a high A1 score with low non-vacuous coverage is the vacuity signature the informativeness guard exists to catch

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: this is a G2-class formal/annotation DIAGNOSTIC over the SAME 84 self-authored kernel-v0-derived slots the g2 readout scored — never W1, never G4, no host model, no competitiveness sentence in any direction. Gold is the directive-#11 LLM proxy pair: every verdict is PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; the later two-human adjudicated panel is the sole authority for any permanent scientific adoption, and a proxy GO followed by a human-gold failure is governed by the human result (plan section 7.7 last row). A PASS licenses exactly: bounded promotion of the winning non-binding soft-preference shard (advisory rank/lint/explain only, outside hard closure, provenance exposed) — it does NOT license hard imported laws, identity changes, automatic bridge endorsement, Pi-replacement (open maintainer decision 10), gUFO claims (not loaded; separately gated), any statement about ontology correctness, or ANY feasibility conclusion about either programme thesis. A FAIL is symmetrically scoped: it kills the imported-soft-type fix AT THIS SCOPE (84 slots, this rendering, this proxy instrument), not foundational-ontology import as such. The 34/84 gate is a maintainer-ratified point-estimate ENGINEERING gate; no superiority claim of any statistical form is licensed even on PASS (Wilson/McNemar co-reported for honesty, not for licensing). Coverage disclosure, mandatory: kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, measured by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage. Baseline caveat inherited and restated: the frozen g2 33/84 readout is itself estimation-only (its own n>=500 gate unattainable on this corpus). Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim.
hypotheses: H-SOFT (load-bearing, the issue-#20 bet): replacing the hand-authored HARD universal 4-sort typing (the measured 0.39 over-constraint) with IMPORTED, explicitly SOFT BFO/SUMO/FrameNet type expectations over the SAME 84 slots raises blind ordinary-meaning soundness to at least 34/84 on the primary construction — the over-constraint is a property of the hard-law routing, not of typing as such. [rider: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate; soft non-binding typing only; no feasibility conclusion]

H-SRC (secondary, source attribution): FrameNet valency evidence adds value over BFO+SUMO — read from the A3 vs A2 comparison; if only A2 passes the decision is GO-BFO-SUMO / NO-GO-FRAMENET pending redesign. [same rider]

H-BREADTH-NULL (anti-gaming control, equal prominence): broad foundational categories alone can appear sound by being vacuous — A1 (BFO-only) is the breadth/vacuity control; vacuous top-entity outputs score 0, and A1 can never authorize adoption regardless of its score. [same rider]

H-INSTRUMENT (premise, gated not hypothesised): the directive-#11 proxy pair remains a stable instrument on soft-modality statements — kappa >= 0.40, >= 90% decisive (the highest RT-4-decidable bar at n=84), deranged-sort soft-hedged probe false-satisfaction <= 0.30 per judge per arm; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS. [same rider]
kill_criterion_verbatim: ONT-TYPE-G2/1 kills (plan sections 7.5-7.7, fixed 84-slot denominator, vacuity-zeroed scoring, frozen baseline 33/84 — rider on every sentence): NO-GO-ONTOLOGY-IMPORT iff neither A2 nor A3 reaches 34/84 sound on the primary judge-pA construction — the imported soft type layer does NOT fix the g2 over-constraint and the type-layer-replacement direction of issue #20 dies at this scope (the hand-authored hard scheme stays demoted-to-lint per the g2 readout; rescue paths named IN the verdict: (i) human-gold re-adjudication of the SAME frozen package, (ii) a redesigned rendering under a NEW record, (iii) the annotation-only bridge WITHOUT g2 routing — none licensed by this record). NO-GO-VACUOUS iff A3 soundness passes but non-vacuous coverage < 67/84 overall or < 34/42 on R3 — breadth masquerading as soundness; treated as FAIL with equal prominence. A1 passing alone can NEVER authorize adoption (breadth control). INSTRUMENT-INVALID (kappa < 0.40, decisive < 95%, probe false-satisfaction > 0.30, pin drift, blinding hit) is no conclusion: repair and mint a new frozen run. Budget kill: reaching the 628-call ceiling or the $10 hard stop before complete labels stops WITHOUT partial scoring. Deflationary outcomes get equal prominence with any positive. Rider verbatim: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate, not statistical superiority; soft non-binding typing only — never hard laws; no feasibility conclusion.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:judge CLI version banners printed by run-ontg2.py preflight (npx codex --version == 'codex-cli 0.144.1'; claude --version >= 2.1.201) recorded in each judge's preflight-status.json; ops amendment records both banner sets before any final-phase call

model_revisions.judge-pA: gpt-5.6-sol via npx-pinned openai codex CLI 0.144.1 (exec, effort low, read-only, ephemeral, server-side output schema) — the directive-#11 primary stand-in invocation family, verbatim from poc/g2/run-g2lp.py
model_revisions.judge-pB: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 via headless claude CLI >= 2.1.201 (tools disabled, no session persistence, thinking off) — sensitivity judge; vendor-family overlap with the materials' authoring agents DISCLOSED, never sole gold

runner_constraints.hardware: this box, CPU only (2 shared cores); judge calls are remote CLI invocations metered by the 628-call ceiling and the $10 hard stop
runner_constraints.harness: poc/ontology-import-g2/run-ontg2.py (pinned above; faithful port of the audited poc/g2/run-g2lp.py machinery — run-g2lp.py itself stays byte-identical). Build is poc/ontology-import-g2/build-softtype.py; regenerating any material after freeze is a pin break and voids the run.
runner_constraints.stage_discipline: ORDER, enforced: (1) coordinator registers PROPOSED-ASM-1360..1379 (registry/assumptions.jsonl, append-only); (2) experiment-designer role freezes this record via tools/registry/prereg-freeze.py after green mock (run-ontg2.py mock <dir> go|nogo|instrument — all three GREEN 2026-07-12 on this box) + pre-freeze skeptic pass (including the ASM-1366-style check that BRIDGE was not tuned to per-item baseline labels); (3) tools/registry/reuse-check.py check --record registry/experiments/g2-import.json --gate recorded pre-spend; (4) ops amendment fills pins.harness_manifest with the preflight version banners; (5) runner role: preflight pA + pB, then per judge x arm real + probe blocks (any cap pattern = STOP, no retry; any blinding hit = ABORT), assemble; (6) analyst: verdict-gen mechanical + report; (7) cross-vendor Codex audit. Designer never runs/grades; runner never designs/concludes; the identity that authored the bridge table never judges.

title: g2-import (ONT-TYPE-G2/1, issue #20) — does an IMPORTED foundational-ontology SOFT type layer (BFO categorial anchors + SUMO selectional preferences + FrameNet valency evidence, routed as non-binding policy/rank-only expectations) fix the g2 over-constraint — i.e. beat the frozen hand-authored HARD 4-sort scheme's soundness 33/84 = 0.3929 on the SAME 84 slots under the SAME directive-#11 blind proxy rubric? Arms: A0 frozen baseline (no new calls), A1 BFO-only breadth control (can NEVER authorize adoption), A2 BFO+SUMO, A3 BFO+SUMO+FrameNet (intended adoption arm). Primary gate: sound_A3 >= 34/84 (strict point-estimate improvement; Wilson + exact McNemar reported, never verdict-bearing). VERDICT-NAME MAPPING (pinned): PASS == GO-BFO-SUMO-FRAMENET when /analysis/go_combined, else GO-BFO-SUMO (A2-only pass; NO-GO-FRAMENET pending redesign); FAIL == NO-GO-VACUOUS when /gates/informative_valid is false, else NO-GO-ONTOLOGY-IMPORT; INSTRUMENT-INVALID == no conclusion, repair and mint a new frozen run. RIDER on every verdict sentence, verbatim: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate, not statistical superiority; soft non-binding typing only — never hard laws; no feasibility conclusion.
